title: Piquant Arabian Dates Dumplings
description: Malty, dense, date-night Saudi Arabian dumplings made with puff pastry and aromatic spices, served wrapped in an elegant ti-leaf-wrap.
instructions: Line a baking sheet with parchment paper and lay the two sheets of puff pastry flat.
Cut each sheet into 6 equal squares to make a total of 12 squares.
Mash the pitted dates with a fork until they form a sticky paste.
Stir the date paste with allspice, cinnamon, cardamom, salt, and olive oil until fully blended.
Place a teaspoon of the spice‑date mixture onto the center of each pastry square.
Fold the squares into triangles, pressing the edges together and sealing them with a fork.
Bake the dumplings for 15 minutes, or until they are golden and puffed.
Remove from the oven, let them cool slightly, and then wrap each dumpling in a ti‑leaf wrap before serving.
